data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.info in blocks-rent-collection context — status badge for informational rent-collection messages (e.g., payment received, receipt issued). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.warning in blocks-rent-collection context — status badge for non-blocking concerns (e.g., upcoming due date, partial payment). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.error in blocks-rent-collection context — status badge for blocking failures (e.g., payment processor declined, missing tenant record). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.critical in blocks-rent-collection context — status badge for funds-impacting failures (e.g., reconciliation mismatch, duplicate charge). Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.save in blocks-rent-collection context — pilot string for the cluster-A cascade proof. UI button or status label when persisting a rent payment record. Imperative; sentence case. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates in-progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.cancel in blocks-rent-collection context — dismiss/abort button on rent-collection forms and dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.retry in blocks-rent-collection context — retry button after a payment processing or notification failure. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] state.loading in blocks-rent-collection context — empty-state placeholder while fetching rent-roll data. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis (single character); translators preserve the convention.
